creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214421
py-django-debug-toolbar-switch-to-django22.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that switches www/py-django-debug-toolbar to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) because Django 1.11 is End-of-Life.

It also sets the repo-copied port www/py-dj22-django-debug-toolbar as deprecated and removes www/py-dj21-django-debug-toolbar from the CONFLICTS_INSTALL entries.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
